final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for a gaming monitor launch.

Style/medium: clean minimalist graphic design, premium tech brand aesthetic, editorial typography
Composition: rule of thirds layout, large headline in upper third, product specs in lower third, generous negative space
Subject: bold typographic headline "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" as hero element, clean sans-serif typeface
Scene/backdrop: solid neutral background (deep charcoal or pure white), no environmental context
Lighting/mood: flat even lighting, crisp and professional, confident and premium
Color palette: monochromatic base with single accent color (electric blue or neon green) for emphasis
Text (verbatim): "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz", "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩"
Constraints: must scale to 9:16 vertical format; headline must dominate frame for thumbnail readability; all Chinese text preserved exactly
Avoid: busy backgrounds, gradients unless essential, generic gaming RGB overload, 3D renders, cluttered layouts, stock photo elements
